UNH.rationale: Valuation is the dominant factor: UNH trades at 22.3x P/E near the bottom of its 1-year range while ROE remains 25.3%, and the 10.9% 3-month pullback has set up an attractive risk/reward despite mild Q4 EPS softness.

ROE 25.3% with 89.6% gross margin — best-in-class profitability intact
3-month return -10.9% and 1-year -7.3% — pullback creates entry point at $472.59
